blocks.text: Global Printing and Packaging Expertise Built Across Asia
Delivering world-class packaging solutions through our dual-hub manufacturing network in China, Vietnam and Thailand.

Our 30,000 m² facility in Bắc Ninh integrates 8 semi-automatic and 10 fully automatic production lines, delivering 1 million gift boxes and 10 million labels monthly. Equipped with Heidelberg XL106 and KBA 162 presses, we offer water-based ink printing for eco-compliant packaging
13,900 m² Dongguan plant specializing in premium color boxes and board-game packaging. Roland and Komori press lines ensure precision.
30,000 m² Bắc Ninh site driving FSC-certified production for export markets under ASEAN RCEP coverage.
New 2024 facility in Chon Buri focusing on e-commerce packaging and rapid regional logistics.

Unified digital proofing and CTP systems enable 72-hour design-to-production turnaround across our network. Vietnam’s UV foiling and eco coatings meet EU/US compliance and anti-counterfeiting standards.

Our advanced manufacturing facilities are equipped with state-of-the-art printing and finishing technology, enabling us to handle projects of any scale with precision and consistency.From short runs to mass production, we deliver high-volume output while maintaining exceptional quality standards across every order.
Quality is at the core of our operations.

With strict quality control protocols and certifications including FSC®, ISO, SMETA-4P, and GMI, we ensure every packaging product meets international standards.Each stage — from raw material selection to final inspection — follows a zero-defect policy to guarantee consistency, reliability, and brand protection.
Every brand is unique, and so is every packaging solution we create.

Our design and engineering teams collaborate closely with clients to develop tailor-made structures, finishes, and visual concepts that reflect their identity.By combining creativity with advanced CAD design and digital proofing systems, we turn concepts into market-ready packaging that stands out on the shelf.

We believe long-term partnerships are built on trust, quality, and continuous innovation. By combining engineering precision with creative design, we deliver packaging solutions that inspire confidence and support our clients’ growth worldwide
